fields.implementation_summary: Renamed the public workflow count field from dependees to dependee_count across CLI, MCP, HTTP, and ticket-viewer consumers, and relabeled ticket document depends_on display text as Dependencies.
fields.title: Rename ticket dependency labels
fields.validation_summary: Manual ticket CLI smoke test confirmed next and board show emit dependee_count and no dependees key. cargo check -p ticket-viewer and cargo check -p ticket-mcp passed. The targeted ticket-cli integration sandbox was blocked by an unrelated workspace initialization failure before assertions ran.
